title: NOVA-142: Update launch page integration for v2 checkout API
author: derek.vasquez
content:
# NOVA-142: Update launch page integration for v2 checkout API

**Status:** BLOCKED
**Priority:** Critical
**Assignee:** Derek Vasquez
**Sprint:** Launch Alpha Sprint 4
**Story Points:** 3

## Description
Checkout endpoint changed from /v1/checkout to /v2/checkout last night. The launch page integration still calls the old endpoint. Without this fix, the checkout button on the launch page will return a 404 error in production.

## Reason for Block
Checkout endpoint changed from /v1/checkout to /v2/checkout last night.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Launch page integration updated to call /v2/checkout
- [ ] Integration test passes on staging
- [ ] QA smoke test completed and signed off by Kai Torres
- [ ] No regression on existing checkout flow behavior

## Comments
**kai.torres** (2026-04-25 07:52): Confirmed failing on staging. Smoke test hits 404 at /v1/checkout. Not signing off until this merges.

**alice.chen** (2026-04-25 09:02): This needs to be resolved before we can go-live Monday. Derek, what's ETA?

**derek.vasquez** (2026-04-25 09:05): Fix in progress. Should have a PR by EOD Friday. QA can rerun Saturday morning if the merge completes tonight.
